steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The text discusses testing hypotheses about how often a word appears ("the eighth most commonly used noun" — a frequency claim). The blank describes how common or widespread a word is.

steps.title: Pick the precise word
steps.content:
"Pervasive" means widespread or prevalent — exactly the frequency concept. "Credible" describes believability, "assertive" describes manner, and "profound" describes depth — none capture frequency.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
